title: clusia fragrans
intro: Clusia fragrans, also known as the 'Frangipani Clusia', is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its showy white flowers and fragrant scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clusia fragrans include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Clusia fragrans can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
